title: More Compatibility Variants (Nature's Spirit)
description: Adding compatibility for Nature's Spirit wood types to More Variants Mods. This is NOT an expansion, it simply resolves a crafting issue between these mods and Nature's Spirit.
body:
# More Compatibility Variants ([Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit))
If you've tried to use [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) with any of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieon-studios)'s and my _More Variants_ mods, you've probably noticed that you can't craft the things you want with the Nature's Spirit woods.

![crafting failed](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/gpm2b.png)  
<sup>Using [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) Coconut wood with [More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion) results in sadness...</sup>

This mod resolves the problem by making sure that you can still craft the vanilla recipes with Nature's Spirit woods even if you have the cool variants.

It doesn't add any new textures, but you won't be stuck without a crafting table at the beach anymore!

![crafting success](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/7c1ui.png)  
<sup>...but not with this mod!</sup>

It works with all of [LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)'s and [Pnku](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku)'s "vanilla"¹ mods including [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) and also [Nemo's Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-campfires). Visit [pnku.de](https://www.pnku.de) for a complete list.

¹: [More Feeding Trough Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-feeding-trough-variants) and [More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-nemos-woodcutter-variants) are not included.


**Why was this needed?**  
If you have eg. [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion), you can't craft a chest from planks added by Nature's Spirit. You just can't. Similarly, you can't craft, say, a Cactus Fence with Sticks from [More Stick Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants).
With this mod, you can craft the "basic" version of all things you'd expect to craft from Nature's Spirit's wood.

**Do I _need_ all those mods installed? I just want nicer chests and barrels...**  
No, you can pick and choose whichever Variant mod you want.
